'use client' import { useState } from 'react' import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Disclosure, DisclosureButton, DisclosurePanel } from '@headlessui/react' import { Bars3Icon, MinusSmallIcon, PlusSmallIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline' import { ArrowPathIcon, LockClosedIcon, FingerPrintIcon, Cog6ToothIcon, ServerIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/solid' import BetterVet from '../assets/betterVet.png' import ConstantContact from '../assets/cc.png' import LogMeIn from '../assets/logmein.png' import WFF from '../assets/wff.png' import selfie from '../assets/selfie.jpg' const navigation = [ { name: 'About', href: '#' }, { name: 'Contact', href: '#' }, { name: 'Education', href: '#' }, { name: 'Company', href: '#' }, ] const features = [ { name: 'Leadership and Team Management', description: 'Proven ability to manage and lead teams across different roles and organizations, including managing performance, conducting training, and mentoring staff.', icon: UserGroupIcon, // Replace with appropriate icon for leadership }, { name: 'Technical Support and Problem Solving', description: 'Extensive experience in technical support roles, including handling escalations, resolving complex technical issues, and implementing solutions to improve team effectiveness.', icon: SupportIcon, // Replace with appropriate icon for technical support }, { name: 'Project Management', description: 'Skilled in managing projects from conception to execution, including overseeing technical support projects, leading multiple initiatives, and ensuring high standards for productivity.', icon: ClipboardListIcon, // Replace with appropriate icon for project management }, { name: 'Compliance and Quality Assurance', description: 'Expertise in ensuring compliance with regulations and maintaining high-quality standards, including creating and reviewing staffing lines and protecting company reputation.', icon: ShieldCheckIcon, // Replace with appropriate icon for compliance }, { name: 'Training and Development', description: 'Experienced in designing and delivering training programs, developing content, and coordinating training schedules to enhance team skills and performance.', icon: AcademicCapIcon, // Replace with appropriate icon for training and development }, { name: 'Strategic Planning and Analysis', description: 'Ability to conduct strategic planning and analysis, including assessing and implementing strategies to maximize team effectiveness and improve operational efficiency.', icon: ChartBarIcon, // Replace with appropriate icon for strategic planning }, ] function classNames(...classes) { return classes.filter(Boolean).join(' ') } export default function Example() { const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false) return (
